title: Explorers dream
description: This modpack is designed to make exploration fun and immersive, without frying your hardware
body:
I made this modpack to enhance the exploration aspect of Minecraft, But mase sure it isn't heavy to run.

it features many performance mods and structure mods, alongside the betterend mod which basically revamps the whole end, surprisingly without affecting performance that much, this modpack also features Travel's backpacks to help you explore for longer periods of time, I did not include Tectonic and other biome altering mods because they cause noticable performance drops.
